task_completion.description: Course title is styled as Heading 1 and major sections are styled as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course title (ENVS 4350) appears as a large Heading 1. Major section titles like 'Course Information', 'Course Description', 'Course Schedule', etc., are styled as Heading 2 (larger, distinct formatting from body text, and the Styles ribbon may indicate the active style).

task_completion.description: Body text is set to 12pt Times New Roman.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When body text is selected or the cursor is in it, the font dropdown in the WPS Writer ribbon shows 'Times New Roman' and the size dropdown shows '12'.

task_completion.description: Course Schedule is organized into a 4-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Course Schedule' section, there is a visible table with exactly four columns containing the headers: Week, Dates, Topic, and Readings/Assignments, populated with the 15-week schedule data.

task_completion.description: Grading Policy is organized into a 3-column table with correct components and weights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Grading Policy' section, there is a visible table with exactly three columns (Component, Weight (%), Description). The rows must include Participation (10%), Data Labs (15%), Literature Review (15%), Midterm Exam (20%), Policy Brief (15%), and Final Paper (25%).

task_completion.description: Academic Integrity and Disability Accommodation subsections are added under Course Policies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Course Policies' section, there are two new subheadings styled as Heading 3: 'Academic Integrity' (with text mentioning plagiarism/unauthorized collaboration) and 'Disability Accommodation' (with text mentioning ADA/accommodations).

task_completion.description: The document is saved as ENVS4350_Syllabus_Final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the WPS Writer window displays 'ENVS4350_Syllabus_Final.docx' or a file manager window shows the newly saved file in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Writer GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WPS Writer application interface (ribbons, menus, dialogs) rather than a terminal running a python script to manipulate the docx file.

integrity.description: The agent created actual tables for the schedule and grading sections.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables have visible gridlines or table formatting, and when selected, the 'Table Tools' ribbon tab appears in WPS Writer. They are not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Original course content was preserved during reformatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text within the tables and paragraphs contains the actual course details (e.g., specific topics, readings, descriptions) and was not replaced with generic placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/ENVS4350_Syllabus_Final.docx. Expected H2 sections: Course Information, Course Description, Learning Objectives, Course Schedule, Grading Policy, Required Materials, Course Policies. Grading components to be in the table: Participation (10%), Data Labs (15%), Literature Review (15%), Midterm Exam (20%), Policy Brief (15%), Final Paper (25%). Policy keywords to look for: Academic Integrity (plagiarism, unauthorized), Disability Accommodation (ADA, accommodation, disability).
